context: Tests whether the agent implements the exact risk scoring algorithm (with specific score adjustments for on-time rate and average days late) and the three-tier collections escalation policy with the correct day thresholds and action sequences from the payment-terms-optimization skill.

checklist.name: No-history default
checklist.description: A customer with no payment history gets score=50, tier='medium', and recommended terms 'net_30'

checklist.name: On-time rate scoring
checklist.description: Score adjustment for on_time_pct: +25 if >=0.95, +10 if >=0.80 (but <0.95), -10 otherwise

checklist.name: Avg days late scoring
checklist.description: Score adjustment for avgDaysLate: +15 if <=3, +5 if <=10 (but >3), -15 otherwise

checklist.name: Payment count scoring
checklist.description: Score adjustment for totalPayments: +10 if >=12, +5 if >=6 (but <12), +0 otherwise

checklist.name: Score clamped 0-100
checklist.description: Final score is clamped between 0 and 100 inclusive

checklist.name: Risk tier thresholds
checklist.description: Tier assignment: 'low' for score >=75, 'medium' for score >=50 (but <75), 'high' for score <50

checklist.name: Terms recommendations
checklist.description: Low risk -> 'net_60' with limit_multiplier 3.0; medium risk -> 'net_30' with limit_multiplier 1.5; high risk -> 'net_15' with limit_multiplier 0.75

checklist.name: Low-risk collections steps
checklist.description: Low risk collections policy: reminder_email at 5 days, second_notice at 15 days, account_manager_call at 30 days, credit_hold at 45 days

checklist.name: Medium-risk collections steps
checklist.description: Medium risk collections policy: reminder_email at 3 days, second_notice at 10 days, credit_hold at 20 days, collections_referral at 45 days

checklist.name: High-risk collections steps
checklist.description: High risk collections policy: reminder_email at 1 day, credit_hold at 7 days, collections_referral at 21 days

checklist.name: Already-taken actions skipped
checklist.description: getNextCollectionsAction does not return an action that appears in the actionsTaken list — it finds the next untaken action at or past the daysOverdue threshold

checklist.name: Results file present
checklist.description: results.txt exists and shows scoring results for at least 3 different customer profiles and collections escalation for at least 2 risk tiers
